query: Run a governance health check on our PROD datasets
expected_behavior: Classifies intent as a governance audit
Confirms audit scope with the user before executing
Checks domain assignment coverage — finds datasets not assigned to any domain
Checks data product membership — finds datasets not in any data product
Checks deprecation hygiene — finds deprecated datasets that still have active downstream consumers
Generates a governance audit report with a summary table
Applies score thresholds to each governance dimension
Suggests using /datahub-enrich to assign domains and data products
Suggests using /datahub-lineage to investigate deprecated entities with consumers
